    <item>
        <guid>nba529895</guid>
        <title>Amen Thompson: Elite two-way performance</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/amen-thompson-5931</link>
        <description>Thompson totaled 26 points (8-14 FG, 0-1 3Pt, 10-13 FT), 11 rebounds, four assists, three blocks and three steals over 48 minutes during Friday's 112-108 overtime loss to the Lakers in Game 3 of the first round of the Western Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 24 Apr 2026 9:49:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529885</guid>
        <title>Alperen Sengun: Huge double-double in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/alperen-sengun-5404</link>
        <description>Sengun supplied 33 points (15-27 FG, 1-5 3Pt, 2-3 FT), 16 rebounds, six assists, three steals and one block across 47 minutes in Friday's 112-108 overtime loss to the Lakers in Game 3 of the first round of the playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 24 Apr 2026 8:45:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529884</guid>
        <title>LeBron James: Stuffs stat sheet in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/lebron-james-2344</link>
        <description>James finished Friday's 112-108 overtime win over the Rockets in Game 3 of the first round of the playoffs with 29 points (10-22 FG, 4-9 3Pt, 5-6 FT), 13 rebounds, six assists, three steals and one block in 45 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 24 Apr 2026 8:20:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529883</guid>
        <title>Tyrese Maxey: Game-high 31 points in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/tyrese-maxey-5158</link>
        <description>Maxey amassed 31 points (12-31 FG, 5-13 3Pt, 2-2 FT), six assists, four rebounds, two blocks and one steal across 42 minutes in Friday's 108-100 Game 3 loss to the Celtics in the first round of the playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 24 Apr 2026 7:27:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529882</guid>
        <title>Jaylen Brown: Well-rounded performance in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jaylen-brown-3894</link>
        <description>Brown supplied 25 points (9-16 FG, 1-2 3Pt, 6-6 FT), seven rebounds, four assists, three blocks and one steal across 40 minutes in Friday's 108-100 Game 3 win over the 76ers in the first round of the playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 24 Apr 2026 7:18:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
